name: Vet Worthy Wild Alaskan Salmon Oil Blend Cat Supplement, 8-oz bottle
description: Help your furry friend look and feel paws-itively paw-some with this Vet Worthy Wild Alaskan Salmon Oil Blend Cat Supplement! This oil is packed with high levels of omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids to support your cat companion’s skin and coat health. This oil is formulated by veterinarians and has a whisker-licking fish flavor that cats love!
